item.name: Sabotender Emperador Horn
item.description: This eccentric horn emits a thunderous toot that summons the Sabotender Emperador.

mount.name: Sabotender Emperador
mount.action: Summon forth Sabotender Emperador and bask in his desert sun radiance.
mount.description: No one knows exactly why the Manderville Gold Saucer was built to resemble a sabotender, just as no one knows why its mascot is a sabotender or why more than half of its drink menu features sabotender-themed “cact-tails.” This giant flying sabotender will not see you any closer to those answers, but it is fun to stare at.
mount.tooltip:
Very fleet of foot,
those sabotenders.
- Mayaru Moyaru
